lines: "They are dead. I know. The wheat is too polite now."
"Thank you for not wrapping it in sugar. Sugar brings ants, and I cannot slap them."
"Safe. Good. I knew the Choir would speak sternly to them. Very sternly. Holy sternly."
"When rapture comes, I may only tax them a little. For rope damages."
"You saw the yard. Do not tidy your face before you answer. I have watched one hundred harvests. I know tidy means trouble."
"Are they well? Tell me straight, or tell me kind. I am not sure which I deserve."

effects.log: Edrin gives up the location of his old forest stash.
Edrin gives up the location of his old forest stash.
Edrin gives up the location of his old forest stash.

lines: "Have you checked the family? I would go, but the wheat has promoted me to permanent staff."
"If they are angry, say I kept watch. I still know the sound of their door."

effects.log: Edrin rustles in his ropes, pleased and offended at once.

lines: A calcified man stands lashed above the wheat. His legs are stone, his ribs are pale shell, and his face still works in a narrow patch of living skin.
"Hail, traveler. You may address me as Edrin Holt, advanced scarecrow and future road prince."
"If Garron sent you, tell him I am nearly royal."

choices.label: Ask why he is in the field

effects.log: Edrin rustles in his ropes, pleased and offended at once.

lines: "The family put me here after the Stilling. Practical people. They had grain, crows, and one brother who could no longer run away from work."
"I was angry for the first thirty years. Then the youngest started bringing soup in a cup tied to a pole, and the field stopped feeling empty."
"The Choir came singing through the wheat and called me holy. Properly holy, not village holy, which mostly meant no one wanted to touch me."
"They said rapture is coming. The calcified will rise first. Garron will point armies. I will walk to the house and ask why the cups stopped clinking at breakfast."
"Of course I believe it. A man must have ambitions. Mine were once boots. Now they are standing in the yard without ropes."
"I will be merciful. No shouting at the children. No ropes for anyone who can still feel them."
"Garron doubts anything that arrives singing. He had more road than I did, and the road taught him mean."
"I had wheat and kitchen smoke on clear mornings. That made me easier to fool."
"Mockery noted. I will remember it after ascension, if remembering still belongs to me."
"Still, check the family. Even a future prince keeps accounts."
"The family that set me here lives by the yard. They were not gentle, but they were mine after a fashion."
"The Choir said they would speak to them about disrespect. I hope that means stern words and not knives. Please check."

effects.log: Edrin goes quiet long enough for the wheat to rasp around him.

lines: "Perhaps. I said worse in year twelve."
"Still check. Anger is not permission to vanish people. I learned that after year thirteen."
"Dead. Ah."
"The Choir promised stern words. They left the yard quiet instead."
"I had a stash before the Stilling. Forest side of the branch road, under roots beside a split stump. Take it. I have no pockets, and no wish to enrich the crows."
"Safe. Good. That is good."
"When I rise, I will visit them first and be gracious. I have practiced that word for years."
"I had a stash before the Stilling. Forest side of the branch road, under roots beside a split stump. Take it for the news. I cannot exactly fetch it with dignity."
"You made the truth wear boots before it came in."
"Fine. Let it stand there. I have stood in worse company."
"Forest side of the branch road, under roots beside a split stump. My old stash is there. Take it and go before I mistake your voice for theirs."
